message:
Fix stale workload requests overwriting current selection (#4406)

Add AbortController-based request cancellation and request ID tracking
to prevent stale API responses from overwriting the current workload
selection when users rapidly switch between clusters or namespaces.

When options change, the previous in-flight request is aborted via
AbortController.abort(), and a monotonically increasing request counter
ensures that any response arriving after a newer request has started is
silently discarded rather than updating state.

Fixes #4382

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
